prompt_text:
### Demographics: 65-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 7 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Major Depressive Disorder
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 59.5 kg; Height 153.1 cm; BMI 25.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 118/76 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.2%; 9 months ago 7.5%; 6 months ago 7.0%; 3 months ago 6.8%; current 5.8%), FPG (12 months ago 170mg/dL; 9 months ago 162mg/dL; 6 months ago 183mg/dL; 3 months ago 177mg/dL; current 127mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 60.7kg; 9 months ago 60.1kg; 6 months ago 57.8kg; 3 months ago 62.1kg; current 59.5kg), Height (12 months ago 153.1cm; 9 months ago 153.1cm; 6 months ago 153.1cm; 3 months ago 153.1cm; current 153.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 26.0kg/m²; current 25.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 122mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 118mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 75mmHg; 9 months ago 74mmHg; 6 months ago 75mmHg; 3 months ago 75mmHg; current 76mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 51U/L; 9 months ago 51U/L; 6 months ago 43U/L; 3 months ago 44U/L; current 49U/L), AST (12 months ago 49U/L; 9 months ago 43U/L; 6 months ago 49U/L; 3 months ago 51U/L; current 48U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 29mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 30mL/min/1.73m²; current 26mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 592mg/g; 9 months ago 766mg/g; 6 months ago 742mg/g; 3 months ago 743mg/g; current 635mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 89mg/dL; 9 months ago 87mg/dL; 6 months ago 92mg/dL; 3 months ago 88mg/dL; current 90mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 34mg/dL; 9 months ago 36mg/dL; 6 months ago 36mg/dL; 3 months ago 34mg/dL; current 35mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 166mg/dL; 9 months ago 149mg/dL; 6 months ago 160mg/dL; 3 months ago 163mg/dL; current 154mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.2g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
